query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photographic portrait featuring overlapping profile and frontal views of the same person merged together, with one face oriented toward the right and another partially visible behind and above, showing duplicated facial features including eyes, nose, and mouth in layered alignment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal black-and-white photographic portrait created through double exposure, overlapping a sharp profile view of a person's face facing right with a ghosted, translucent secondary exposure showing another angle of the same face behind and above it, producing an uncanny merged visage with duplicate eyes, noses, and soft ethereal haloing around the contours.
